Stable, pay-as-you-go AI API platform

Move beyond Claude Max and Codex subscriptions

Tamgur provides stable API access for Claude Code, Codex, GPT-5 and Gemini without monthly plans. Top up anytime and pay only for the usage you need.

Get started · Read the API documentation

Works with your development tools

Use Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline, Roo Code, the OpenAI SDK and the Anthropic SDK with one API key.

Simple pay-as-you-go pricing

No monthly subscription is required. Usage is calculated against each selected model provider's published official API pricing.

Price examples per 1 million tokens

GPT-5: official input $1.25 / MTok versus approximately $0.37 / MTok with Tamgur; official output $10.00 / MTok versus approximately $2.99 / MTok with Tamgur. Claude Sonnet 4.6: official input $3.00 / MTok versus approximately $0.90 / MTok; official output $15.00 / MTok versus approximately $4.49 / MTok. Gemini 2.5 Pro: official input $1.25 / MTok versus approximately $0.37 / MTok; official output $10.00 / MTok versus approximately $2.99 / MTok. Prices were verified on June 13, 2026.

These are illustrative estimates calculated at 29.9% of published official API rates. Providers may change their prices. See the official pricing pages for GPT-5, Claude and Gemini.

Frequently asked questions

Are the models genuine?

Yes. Tamgur connects to models from their original providers. With the same model version, parameters and context, capabilities remain consistent with the provider's model.

Is access available worldwide?

Tamgur is designed for developers, startups, AI builders and students worldwide, with instant activation after payment.
